example: The government should increase the number of public hospitals.

vietnamese: giảm căng thẳng / ô nhiễm / chi phí

example: I want to improve my English skills.
Factories cause serious air pollution in cities.

word: lead to health problems / success / failure
example: Smoking leads to serious health problems.
Many students lack confidence when speaking English.
We need to solve the traffic problem in big cities.
He works hard to support his family.

word: provide sb with sth / provide sth for sb
vietnamese: cung cấp cho ai cái gì
example: The school provides students with free textbooks.
The rain prevented us from going out.
